title: taraxacum mansehracum
intro: Taraxacum mansehracum, also known as the Himalayan dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum mansehracum include reducing liver and kidney problems, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant often come in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
